name: pinpoint-search-relevance-semantic-v1
notes: This benchmark is designed to stress paraphrase-style retrieval.
If embeddings are unavailable, expect lexical-only behavior and treat results as a lower bound.

queries.query: daily meal allowance for business trips
director must approve overseas travel before booking
how fast should suspicious email be reported
what to do if your account may be hacked
how much leave does the main caregiver get
do employees get a password manager
